raw_text: Management expects continued services revenue expansion and stable gross margin. Risk factors include foreign exchange headwinds and concentrated supplier relationships. Outlook remains constructive with disciplined operating expense growth.
The company announced an expanded capital return program and reiterated demand outlook for services. Management plans to prioritize ecosystem investment while monitoring macroeconomic uncertainty.

Cloud backlog growth remained resilient and commercial bookings improved sequentially. The company expects continued AI infrastructure investment and highlighted risks around energy costs and enterprise spending variability.

The company provided an update on supply partnerships and expects incremental capacity through the second half of the year. Forward-looking statements reference demand concentration and geopolitical risk.
